hero.h1: Four Service Lines. One Company That Cares.
hero.subtitle: Every service we offer exists because we saw a real problem going unsolved. No bundles, no upsells, no surprises.

cta.heading: Not Sure Which Service Fits?
cta.body: Tell us about your situation — we'll recommend the right fit with no pressure.

services.name: IT Break/Fix
services.body: Something broke and you need it fixed — fast. No contracts, no retainers, no minimum commitment. We show up, we fix it, we explain what happened. Billed by the hour with no surprise fees.

services.name: Senior Technology Concierge
services.body: Monthly tech support designed for older adults — or the family members who love them. Monthly check-in call, unlimited scam and phishing review during business hours, and device setup help (up to 2 devices/year). Peace of mind for you. Independence for them.
features: Unlimited scam & phishing review during business hours
Device setup — 2 devices included per year
Emergency line available for urgent issues

services.name: Time-Block Contracts
services.body: Purchase IT hours in advance and save 10% off our standard rate. Ideal for businesses with ongoing or predictable IT needs. Hours never expire and you get priority scheduling over break/fix clients. Minimum purchase of 10 hours.

services.name: IT Professional Services
services.body: Infrastructure projects, network design, server builds, migrations, security audits, and more. Scoped, quoted, and delivered on time. If you have a project that goes beyond break/fix, this is where we start the conversation.
services.priceNote: Scope and timeline set at discovery call. Free 30-minute consultation — no obligation.

services.name: Managed IT
services.body: Dedicated remote IT support, SLA-backed response, and real humans who know your systems before you call.
features: Dedicated technician — same person every time

services.name: Hardware-as-a-Service (HaaS)
services.body: Enterprise-grade refurbished hardware on a flat monthly subscription.

services.name: AI Custom App Development
services.body: Stop paying $800/mo for a stack of SaaS tools that don't talk to each other.
features: You own 100% of the code — forever
